title: What is Odoo ERP?
summary: Odoo is an open source business suite that connects Sales, Accounting, Inventory, CRM, and more in a single workflow-driven platform.

sections.heading: An ERP built for real workflows
sections.body: Odoo brings core business apps together so teams can work with shared data: from quotations and invoices to inventory movements and reporting.

sections.heading: Open source by design
sections.body: Because Odoo is open source, you can learn, customize, and extend it for Bangladesh-specific processes with community support.

faq.q: Is Odoo suitable for SMEs in Bangladesh?
faq.a: Yes. Odoo can scale from SME workflows to larger operations, with modular apps and community-backed knowledge.
